name: Egg Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Celery, finely chopped with leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely dice the eggs.
2. Mix thoroughly with all other ingredients.
3. Cover and chill for at least 1 hour or until flavors are well blended.
4. Mound on crisp lettuce and garnish with a dash of paprika.
5. Serve as a salad, or use as a spread for crackers. This can also be used in a sandwich for a hot day.
